tasks.subject: RC1: Anchoring core library
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Pure buildQuote + locate (exact, context-disambiguated, null on absence).

**Verify:** pnpm test:unit -- tests/unit/anchoring.test.ts

```json:metadata
{"files": ["lib/anchoring.ts", "tests/unit/anchoring.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "pnpm test:unit -- tests/unit/anchoring.test.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["buildQuote bounded context", "locate unique exact", "locate disambiguates repeats", "locate null when absent"]}
```

tasks.subject: RC2: Review-state library
tasks.description:
**Goal:** computeDocumentState(reviews, requiredApprovals) → OPEN/CHANGES_REQUESTED/APPROVED.

**Verify:** pnpm test:unit -- tests/unit/review-state.test.ts

```json:metadata
{"files": ["lib/review-state.ts", "tests/unit/review-state.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "pnpm test:unit -- tests/unit/review-state.test.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["REQUEST_CHANGES dominates", "approvals threshold ⇒ APPROVED", "else OPEN", "dismissed ignored"]}
```

tasks.subject: RC3: Documents service + API
tasks.description:
**Goal:** create/list/getDetail documents; thin auth-guarded routes.

**Verify:** pnpm test:unit -- tests/unit/documents.test.ts

```json:metadata
{"files": ["lib/api.ts", "lib/documents.ts", "tests/unit/documents.test.ts", "app/api/documents/route.ts", "app/api/documents/[id]/route.ts"], "verifyCommand": "pnpm test:unit -- tests/unit/documents.test.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["create doc+v1+currentVersionId", "getDetail full graph", "routes 401", "build passes"]}
```

tasks.subject: RC4: Annotations + comments service + API
tasks.description:
**Goal:** createAnnotation (anchor + first comment), addComment, setThreadStatus; thin routes.

**Verify:** pnpm test:unit -- tests/unit/annotations.test.ts

```json:metadata
{"files": ["lib/annotations.ts", "tests/unit/annotations.test.ts", "app/api/documents/[id]/annotations/route.ts", "app/api/annotations/[id]/comments/route.ts", "app/api/annotations/[id]/route.ts"], "verifyCommand": "pnpm test:unit -- tests/unit/annotations.test.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["anchor+first comment", "addComment appends", "setThreadStatus toggles", "routes guarded"]}
```

tasks.subject: RC5: Reviews service + API (verdict → state)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** submitReview upserts reviewer verdict + recomputes document.state.

**Verify:** pnpm test:unit -- tests/unit/reviews.test.ts

```json:metadata
{"files": ["lib/reviews.ts", "tests/unit/reviews.test.ts", "app/api/documents/[id]/reviews/route.ts"], "verifyCommand": "pnpm test:unit -- tests/unit/reviews.test.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["upsert+recompute", "change-request dominates", "approvals ⇒ APPROVED", "validate verdict"]}
```

tasks.subject: RC6: Documents list + create UI
tasks.description:
**Goal:** /app lists docs + New-document form creates and navigates.

**Verify:** pnpm build

```json:metadata
{"files": ["components/NewDocumentForm.tsx", "app/app/page.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "pnpm build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["lists docs with state+links", "form creates+navigates", "empty state"]}
```

tasks.subject: RC7: Document review view (annotate + comment + verdict) + e2e
tasks.description:
**Goal:** rendered markdown + select-to-comment (highlight) + threads + verdicts; Playwright e2e.

**Verify:** pnpm test:e2e -- tests/e2e/review.spec.ts

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/app/documents/[id]/page.tsx", "components/DocumentView.tsx", "components/CommentSidebar.tsx", "lib/highlight.ts", "tests/e2e/review.spec.ts"], "verifyCommand": "pnpm test:e2e -- tests/e2e/review.spec.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["markdown renders", "select+comment ⇒ annotation+highlight+sidebar", "reply+resolve", "verdicts update badge", "e2e passes"]}
```
